mapper.update: UPDATE car SET status = 1, closed_at = NOW() WHERE status = 0 AND deadline IS NOT NULL AND deadline < #{now}
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.title, c.goods_id, c.goods_name, c.goods_image, c.description, c.total_count, c.current_count, c.price_total, c.price_per, c.deposit_amount, c.deadline, c.distribution_type, c.is_restricted, c.min_credit_score, c.status, c.success_rate, c.match_score, c.tags, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.closed_at, c.completed_at, u.nickname AS userNickname, u.credit_score AS userCredit FROM car c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id
AND c.status = #{car.status}
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{car.title}, '%')
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
